name: Persimmon Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and corn oil until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the persimmon pulp.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, soda, salt, cinnamon, and allspice.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into two greased 9-inch cake pans.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing them and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Once cooled, ice with caramel icing.
Randy Rigg
